name: Mollie
description: Mollie is a European payments API that lets you accept online payments via credit cards, iDEAL, Bancontact, PayPal, and many other methods. It provides a simple REST API for creating payments, managing refunds, handling customers, and setting up recurring subscriptions with strong European market coverage.

capabilities.name: create_payment
capabilities.description: Create a new payment to charge a customer. Returns a checkout URL where the customer completes the payment.

capabilities.name: get_payment
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details and current status of an existing payment by its ID.

capabilities.name: list_payments
capabilities.description: List all payments created on your account, with pagination support for browsing through results.

capabilities.name: create_refund
capabilities.description: Issue a full or partial refund for a completed payment.

capabilities.name: create_customer
capabilities.description: Create a customer record to associate payments and enable recurring billing.

capabilities.name: create_subscription
capabilities.description: Set up a recurring subscription for a customer with a defined interval and amount.
